Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total to 24. The number of dogs in the rescue center is [number_of_dogs_after_saturday]. 

*** 

The rescue center now has [number_of_dogs_after_saturday] dogs. Emily continues to receive new dogs and adopt pets, ensuring that her rescue center remains full of loving animals. The number of dogs in the center is [number_of_dogs_currently].
